title: Amarite Mayhem
body:
![Amarite Mayhem Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/297a87a9c29c0a8c6787ccff78a3d6c8a6ff0254.png)

**Amarite Mayhem adds a couple new items to the game!**

---
This can be used to make various new items such as;

- The Amarite Cleaver: A Cleaver which allows you to infect people with Amarite poisoning.
  
- The Amarite Shatterer: A new heavy hit weapon which allows you to slowly charge up a stronger attack by attacking.

- New Trinkets Masks

_As well as some enchantments for those weapons._

---

_Also fixes some bugs in Amarite <3_

_If you encounter any issues or have a question DM: @Elysieon_

_Note: Cleaver texture is a trace of a cleaver that's made by @semberscythe_

[Check out Amarite!](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite)
